_comment: Scoring weights for the opportunity scanner. All weights must sum to 1.0. Adjust to change how opportunities are ranked.
_note_weights: Total = 1.00. diversificationFit rewards ETFs that reduce concentration. Increase it to favor ETF rebalancing.
_note_thresholds: Opportunities scoring >= buy threshold get BUY state. Discovered (non-seed) assets need +0.5 above seed threshold.
_note_drawdown: Drawdown 15-25% gets highest score. Above 40% is penalized as potential structural break.
_note_discovery: Non-seed assets get this score penalty to require them to be clearly better to surface.
